story.iWant: to receive system and in-app notifications
story.soThat: I'm informed of important events even when the app is in the background
story.tasks: - Create NotificationService in main process using Electron Notification API - Implement in-app toast system with Toast.svelte and ToastContainer.svelte - Implement notification history store (last 50 notifications) - Create notification settings UI with toggles for types - Integrate with application events (new message, workflow complete, errors) - Write tests for notification system

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: System notifications appear in OS notification center (CORE §8.1)
Toasts appear in-app with auto-dismiss after configurable duration (default 3s) (CORE §8.2)
Notification history accessible with last N notifications stored (e.g., 50) (CORE §8.3)
Settings persist across sessions (enable/disable, sound, types filter) (CORE §8.4)
Clicking system notification brings app to focus
Multiple concurrent toasts supported without overlap
Toasts styled by type (info=blue, success=green, warning=orange, error=red)
Notification settings respect OS notification permissions

doc.title: Epic 4 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: System + in-app notifications. Inputs: NotificationPayload (type, title, message, duration). Outputs: OS notifications, toast UI updates. Owner: Main Process.

doc.title: Epic 4 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: interface NotificationPayload {id?, type: 'info'|'success'|'warning'|'error', title, message, icon?, duration? (default 3000ms), action?}

doc.title: Epic 4 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Create NotificationService.ts singleton, implement showSystemNotification() with Electron Notification, create Toast.svelte with auto-dismiss, create ToastContainer for stacking, add history store (50 items), create settings UI.

doc.title: Epic 4 Technical Specification
doc.snippet: Toast notification render time: < 50ms from trigger to visible. Maximum concurrent toasts: 5 (older toasts dismissed automatically).

artifact.reason: NEW - Main process notification service using Electron Notification API
NEW - Renderer process wrapper for IPC calls
NEW - Individual toast component with auto-dismiss timer
NEW - Toast container for stacking and positioning

story-context.constraints: - **Desktop Implementation:** Electron main process for system notifications. Svelte components for in-app toasts. - **Two-Layer System:** System notifications for OS-level (background), toasts for in-app (foreground). - **IPC Communication:** Renderer requests notifications via IPC, main process creates Notification instances. - **Auto-Dismiss:** Toasts auto-dismiss after duration (default 3000ms). Use setTimeout, clear on manual dismiss. - **Stacking:** Max 5 concurrent toasts. When 6th appears, dismiss oldest automatically. - **History:** In-memory store (last 50 notifications). Optional: persist to electron-store for cross-session. - **OS Permissions:** Check if notifications enabled (macOS requires explicit permission). Graceful degradation if disabled.

interface.name: NotificationService.showSystemNotification()
interface.signature: showSystemNotification(payload: NotificationPayload): void - Creates OS notification using Electron Notification API, handles click event to focus window

interface.name: NotificationService.showToast()
interface.signature: showToast(payload: NotificationPayload): void - Emits IPC event to renderer with payload, renderer updates toast store

interface.name: Toast.svelte
interface.signature: Props: {type, title, message, duration}. Renders toast with styling based on type, auto-dismiss after duration, manual dismiss button

interface.name: IPC Handler: notifications:history
interface.signature: ipcMain.handle('notifications:history') returns last 50 notifications from history store

tests.standards: Use vitest for unit tests. Test showSystemNotification() calls Electron Notification API with correct params. Test toast auto-dismiss after duration. Test notification history stores last 50 items. Test settings persist across restarts. Test toast stacking (max 5). Test click notification focuses app.

test.idea: Integration test: Trigger system notification, verify appears in OS center, click notification, verify app window focused
Unit test: Render toast with type='success', verify green styling, wait 3s, verify dismissed
Unit test: Add 100 notifications to history, verify only last 50 stored
Integration test: Toggle notification setting off, restart app, verify setting remembered
Integration test: Show 6 toasts, verify only 5 visible, oldest dismissed
Unit test: Render toasts with all types (info, success, warning, error), verify correct colors
Unit test: Mock OS notification permissions denied, verify graceful degradation (no crash, fallback to toasts only)
